caption: A man with short, graying hair and a beard sits in a recording studio against a wall of dark gray acoustic foam panels. He is wearing large black headphones and a black zip-up hoodie over a gray t-shirt. A professional condenser microphone on a boom arm is positioned directly in front of his face. Throughout the sequence, the man speaks and gestures. He initially looks forward with his right arm raised and hand open in a gesture. He then shifts his gaze to the right while maintaining his position. His eyes close briefly as he continues to speak, and in the final moment, he glances back toward the right as his right hand moves downward and out of the frame. No text or logos are visible on the screen.
